modules.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.build.OeBuildMol
documentation: Classes to build OE molecule objects from chemical component definition data.
File:    OeBuildMol.py
Author:  jdw
Date:    25-Sep-2011
Version: 0.001
Updates:
1-Oct-2011 jdw Add 2D builder, CIP Stereo and SMILES
18-Feb-2012 jdw add 3D builder with aromatic and CIP perception.
20-Feb-2012 jdw Add serialization and deserialization
20-Feb-2012 jdw Add CIP perception for 3D builder
23-Feb-2012 jdw Moved to oe_util/build path.
Revised to use chemical component iterator classes
and to support flat file and persist storage models.
5-May-2014 jdw add method build molecule from input SMILES importSmiles(smiles)
6-Jun-2016 jdw general cleanup and platform selection parsing -  use native python on darwin
8-Jun-2016 jdw add method to instantiate using an existing OEMOL and method to return ccId.
31-Aug-2020 ZF  in importSmiles() function, added checking OEParseSmiles() return status

modules.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepict
documentation: Classes to depict MCS alignments.
File:  OeAlignDepict.py
Date:  2-Oct-2011  J. Westbrook
Updates:
5-Jan-2012 jdw Revise for new OE depiction API
5-Mar-2012 jdw refactor
7-Nar-2012 jdw adapt to support latest OeBuildMol
9-Mar-2012 jdw simplify calling interface
10-Jun-2016 jdw add method setFitPathList

classes.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepict.OeDepictMCSAlign

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepict.OeDepictMCSAlign.setRefId
documentation:
Set the query molecule for MCSS comparison using the input chemical component ID.
It is assumed that the definition for this ID can be obtained from the chemical component
repository.

Once the reference molecule is built, the MCSS calculation is initialized.

A title is optionally provided otherwise the component Id will be used.

The hydrogen flag can be used to perform the MCSS using only heavy atoms.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepict.OeDepictMCSAlign.setRefPath
documentation:
Set the query molecule for MCSS comparison using the input file path.

The file type is either ['CC'] for a chemical component definition or another file type
supported by OE toolkit assumed to have a conventional file extension for this type.

Once the reference molecule is built, the MCSS calculation is initialized.

A title is optionally provided otherwise the component Id will be used.

The hydrogen flag can be used to perform the MCSS using only heavy atoms.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepict.OeDepictMCSAlign.setFitId
documentation: Set the ID of the target/library molecule for MCSS comparison.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepict.OeDepictMCSAlign.setFitPath
documentation: Set the path of the target/library molecule for MCSS comparison.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepict.OeDepictMCSAlign.setFitIdList
documentation:
Set the list of IDs to be compared with reference molecule by MCSS.

From the input ID list build the internal pair list of
tuples  [(refId,refPath,refTitle,fitId,fitPath,fitTitle),(),...]

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepict.OeDepictMCSAlign.setFitPathList
documentation:
Set the list of paths for the target/library molecules to be compared with reference molecule by MCSS.

From the input path tuple list build the internal pair list of
tuples  [(fitId,fitPath,fitTitle),(),...]

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepict.OeDepictMCSAlign.setPairIdList
documentation:
Set the list of ID pais to be aligned by MCSS.

From the input ID list build the internal pair list of
tuples  [(refId,refPath,refTitle,fitId,fitPath,fitTitle),(),...]

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepict.OeDepictMCSAlign.__getCCDefFile
documentation:
Fetch the molecule definition (ccPath) and build OE molecules
for comparison and depiction.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepict.OeDepictMCSAlign.__getMiscFile
documentation:
Fetch a miscellaneous chemical file (ccPath) and build OE molecules
for comparison and depiction.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepict.OeDepictMCSAlign.__setupMCSS
documentation: Internal initialization for the MCSS comparison.

documentation:
Test the MCSS comparison between current reference and fit molecules -
Return list of corresponding atoms on success or an empty list otherwise.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepict.OeDepictMCSAlign.doAlign
documentation:
Test the MCSS comparison between current reference and fit molecules -
Return list of corresponding atoms on success or an empty list otherwise.

documentation:
Test the MCSS comparison between current reference and fit molecules -
Return list of corresponding atoms on success or an empty list otherwise.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepict.OeDepictMCSAlign.__setupImage
documentation: Internal method to configure a single pair alignment image.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepict.OeDepictMCSAlign.__setupImageMulti
documentation: Internal method to configure a multipage image.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepict.OeDepictMCSAlign.__newPage
documentation: Internal method to advance to a new page in a multipage configuration.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepict.OeDepictMCSAlign.alignPair
documentation:
Compare current reference and fit molecules by MCSS.

Map of corresponding atoms is returned.

imagePath is the path of the output image.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepict.OeDepictMCSAlign.alignPairList
documentation:
Compare molecule pairs in the current __pairTupleList.

pairTupleList = (refId,refPath,refTitle,fitId,fitPath,fitTitle)

Map of corresponding atoms is returned.

Image Output is in multipage layout.

Create 2D depictions of MCSS alignments.  Targets can be chemical component identifiers
or paths to chemical component definition files.  Inputs can be in the the form of pairs,
lists, and pair lists of chemical component definitions.

modules.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils

Updates:

comparison list incrementally.

classes.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils.OeDepictAlignBase

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils.OeDepictAlignBase.__init__
documentation: pylint: disable=no-member

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils.OeDepictAlignBase.setRefId
documentation:
Set the query reference molecule for MCSS comparison using the input chemical component ID.
It is assumed that the definition for this ID can be obtained from the chemical component
repository (in cachePath).

Once the reference molecule is built, the MCSS calculation is initialized.

A title and imagePath are optionally provided otherwise the component Id will be used for title and
the basis of the image file name.

The hydrogen flag can be used to perform the MCSS using only heavy atoms.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils.OeDepictAlignBase.setRefPath
documentation:
Set the query reference molecule for MCSS comparison using the input file path.

Once the reference molecule is built, the MCSS calculation is initialized.

A title is optionally provided otherwise the component Id will be used.

The hydrogen flag can be used to perform the MCSS using only heavy atoms.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils.OeDepictAlignBase.setFitId
documentation:
Set the test/fit molecule for MCSS comparison using the input chemical component ID.
It is assumed that the definition for this ID can be obtained from the chemical component
repository (in cachePath).

Once the test/fit molecule is built, the MCSS calculation is initialized.

A title and imagePath are optionally provided otherwise the component Id will be used for title and
the basis of the image file name.

The hydrogen flag can be used to perform the MCSS using only heavy atoms.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils.OeDepictAlignBase.setFitPath
documentation:
Set the test/fit molecule for MCSS comparison using the input file path.

A title and imagePath are optionally provided otherwise the component Id will be used for title and
the basis of the image file name.

The hydrogen flag can be used to perform the MCSS using only heavy atoms.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils.OeDepictAlignBase.setFitIdList
documentation:
Set the list of IDs to be compared with reference molecule by MCSS.

It is assumed that each definition on the list can be obtained from the chemical component
repository (in cachePath).

From the input ID list build the internal pair list (self._pairMolList) of
tuples  [(refId,refPath,refTitle,refImagePath,fitId,fitPath,fitTitle,fitImagePath),(),...]

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils.OeDepictAlignBase.addFitPath
documentation:
Add ID/path to the list of molecules to be compared with reference molecule by MCSS.

The input ID/path is appended to the internal pair list (self._pairMolList).

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils.OeDepictAlignBase.setPairIdList
documentation:
Set the list of ID pairs to be aligned by MCSS.

It is assumed that each definition on the list can be obtained from the chemical component
repository (in cachePath).

From the input pair ID list build the internal pair list (self._pairMolList).

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils.OeDepictAlignBase.setFitPathList
documentation:
Add ID/path to the list of molecules to be compared with reference molecule by MCSS.

The input ID/path is appended to the internal pair list (self._pairMolList).

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils.OeDepictAlignBase.__makeMolfromCCDef
documentation:
Create OE molecule from the chem comp definition in the input path.

Construction is done using the connectivity information only (i.e. no coordinate perception).

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils.OeDepictAlignBase._setupMCSS
documentation: Internal initialization for the MCSS comparison.
Note for pylint testing.  This base class references self._opt and self._param, but it is defined in a child class of a parallel class. We do not init it

classes.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils.OeDepictMCSAlignMulti

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils.OeDepictMCSAlignMulti.__setupImageMulti
documentation: Internal method to configure a multipage image.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils.OeDepictMCSAlignMulti.__newPage
documentation: Internal method to advance to a new page in a multipage configuration.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils.OeDepictMCSAlignMulti.__alignListMultiWorker
documentation:
Working method comparing a reference molecule with a list of fit molecules.

pairMolList = (refId,refMol,refTitle,fitId,fitMol,fitTitle)

Map of corresponding atoms is returned.

Image Output is in multipage layout.
@timeout(500)

Create 2D depictions of MCSS alignments.  Targets can be chemical component identifiers
or paths to chemical component definition files.  Inputs can be in the the form of pairs,
lists, and pair lists of chemical component definitions.

Output can span multiple pages each with grid layout in image formats supporting pagination.

classes.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils.OeDepictMCSAlign

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils.OeDepictMCSAlign.__setupImage
documentation: Internal method to configure a single pair alignment image.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils.OeDepictMCSAlign.alignPair
documentation:
Depict a single aligned ref/fit molecule pair or the first ref/fit molecule pair on the
current _pairMolList.  Display options set for a single grid row with two columns.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.oe_util.oedepict.OeAlignDepictUtils.OeDepictMCSAlign.__alignListWorker
documentation:
Working method comparing a reference molecule with a list of fit molecules.

pairMolList = (refId,refMol,refTitle,refImgPath,fitId,fitMol,fitTitle,fitImgPath)

Map of corresponding atoms is returned.

Output image is a single-page with grid layout.
@timeout(15)

Create 2D depictions of MCSS alignments.  Targets can be chemical component identifiers
or paths to chemical component definition files.  Inputs can be in the the form of pairs,
lists, and pair lists of chemical component definitions.

Output is to a single page image with grid layout.

Output image is a single-page with grid layout.

Create 2D depictions of MCSS alignments.  Targets can be chemical component identifiers
or paths to chemical component definition files.  Inputs can be in the the form of pairs,
lists, and pair lists of chemical component definitions.

Output is to single image files with a single diagram per file.
